rationale.R1.2: The artifact builds a causal chain (batch-formation policy → matmul reduction order → output divergence) and then uses a BLEU-4 variance metric to 'confirm' an ODR finding; the inferential steps connecting these are non-trivial and internally the two metrics measure different constructs, making logical consistency a central concern.
rationale.R1.3: The headline 62% ODR reduction is the load-bearing empirical claim, yet the stated validation evidence (4× reduction in BLEU-4 standard deviation) is a different metric on a different test set — whether this evidence actually supports the headline claim is the primary evidence-alignment question the artifact raises.
